bonuses.leadin: After this action is performed, the character who performed it dances and shouts “That’s the way that go!” For 10 points each:
parts: Name this action that takes place shortly before Troy’s funeral. After this action, “the gates of heaven stand open as wide as God’s closet.”
Gabriel blows his trumpet at the end of this August Wilson play, a part of his Pittsburgh Cycle which chronicles Troy Maxson leaving Rose for Alberta and later dying.
The trumpeter Levee stabs Toledo after the latter steps on his shoes at the climax of this other play in the Pittsburgh Cycle, which centers around a jazz band’s recording session.
answers: Gabriel blowing his trumpet [accept equivalent descriptions; prompt on blowing a trumpet or playing a trumpet with “who blows the trumpet?”]
answers_sanitized: Gabriel blowing his trumpet [accept equivalent descriptions; prompt on blowing a trumpet or playing a trumpet with "who blows the trumpet?"]

parts_sanitized: Name this action that takes place shortly before Troy's funeral. After this action, "the gates of heaven stand open as wide as God's closet."
Gabriel blows his trumpet at the end of this August Wilson play, a part of his Pittsburgh Cycle which chronicles Troy Maxson leaving Rose for Alberta and later dying.
The trumpeter Levee stabs Toledo after the latter steps on his shoes at the climax of this other play in the Pittsburgh Cycle, which centers around a jazz band's recording session.

bonuses.leadin: In one film, a character played by this actor stabs and kills his bandmate Toledo after getting fired by their band leader. For 10 points each:
parts: Name this actor who tragically died in August 2020. The 2021 Oscars made the best actor award the last of the night in order to give it posthumously to this actor, making it really awkward when he didn’t win.
Boseman portrayed this title character of a 2018 Marvel movie in the Marvel Cinematic Universe. This king of Wakanda fights with a suit that can absorb and redistribute energy.

The relatively unknown Boseman broke through as an actor in 2013 when he starred as Jackie Robinson in this biopic. This film also stars Harrison Ford as Branch Rickey, the owner of the Brooklyn Dodgers.
answers: Chadwick Boseman [or Chadwick Aaron Boseman] (The film in the lead-in is Ma Rainey’s Black Bottom.)
answers_sanitized: Chadwick Boseman [or Chadwick Aaron Boseman] (The film in the lead-in is Ma Rainey's Black Bottom.)
